title: Checkpoint route authority hotfix
summary: Forge v2.0.5 prevents checkpoint and handoff suggestions from becoming official `next_action` state unless an explicit state update is authorized.
highlights: `checkpoint --next-action` now writes a non-authoritative continuation suggestion by default instead of mutating `state.yaml`.
`handoff --next-action` now follows the same memory-only default and requires `--update-state` to change the official route.
Fleet `requests apply` ignores legacy checkpoint/handoff route mutations that do not include `state_update_authorized`.
Checkpoint and handoff artifacts now label route authority as `state`, `checkpoint-suggestion`, or `handoff-suggestion`.
